# orm-public-sign-in

<!-- @constructive-io/graphql-codegen - DO NOT EDIT -->

Execute the signIn mutation

## Usage

```typescript
db.mutation.signIn({ input: '<value>' }).execute()
```

## Examples

### Run signIn

```typescript
const result = await db.mutation.signIn({ input: '<value>' }).execute();
```
